model.quantization: mixed Float16 and 6-bit palettized CoreML encoder

runtime.boundary: Node.js native addon driving CoreML and Silero VAD

energy.notes: The repeatable powermetrics procedure is defined, but this baseline did not run with root privileges.

engineering_cost.conversion_effort: Existing working CoreML conversion and native decoder were reused; no model conversion was performed in this repository.
engineering_cost.update_cost: The legacy downloader followed mutable main; the benchmark fetcher now pins and verifies the model and VAD revisions, but decoder compatibility remains repository-owned.
engineering_cost.packaging_cost: The legacy downloader materializes 1.90 GB because it fetches alternative model variants; the four selected CoreML components are about 483 MB before VAD.

observations: The transcript was deterministic across all five measured repetitions.
This legacy API returns final batch segments with time ranges but no confidence values or volatile updates.
The native decoder prints token-level diagnostics to stdout, so --output is required for an uncontaminated JSON artifact.
The published ESM bundle fails under Node.js 24 with a dynamic require of bindings error; the runner deliberately loads the CommonJS entry point.
A single English fixture establishes a runtime baseline but is not sufficient for product selection.
